ul.li: The MSB of the first 8 bytes is a continuation bit.
The 9th byte carries 8 bits of payload.

div.p: 3. Overflow Mechanism Spills to overflow pages if PayloadLength > MaxLocal.

g.title: Total size of the cell excluding RowID. Encoded as a Varint (1-9 bytes).
Unique identifier for the row (B-Tree Key). Used for fast lookups.
Total size of the Record Header, including this field.
Array of Varints mapping data types to columns. Length depends on column count.
Stored as 8-byte big-endian integer. Corresponds to serial type 6.
UTF-8 Encoded string data. Length calculated from serial type code.
4-byte page number of the first page in the overflow chain.
Zero-filled bytes used to align the next record to CPU word boundaries.
Unused space within the cell reserved for row growth or updates.
